narrative:
Perrysburg Twp Glenwood (precinct in Wood County) has 967 registered voters, with 59.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.4%, a modest Republican lean of 3.8 percentage points.
